name: Formaggio (La Squadra)
description:
Formaggio is a member of La Squadra Esecuzioni and the first to be fought. He trails and confronts Narancia Ghirga as the teen goes out to buy supplies and attempts to survive the ordeal while trying to discover where the Boss's daughter, Trish, is being kept.

Formaggio is a Stand user and wields Little Feet.
creator: Small_Ultra
